query:
-- Check existing partner accounts
SELECT id, businessName, contactEmail, tier, isExempt, commissionRate, subscriptionFee 
FROM partners 
ORDER BY id 
LIMIT 20;

SELECT id, businessName, contactEmail, tier, isExempt, commissionRate, subscriptionFee
